context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses Confluent Cloud-specific APIs (ConfluentSettings, ConfluentTools), Statement Sets for multi-output routing, MATCH_RECOGNIZE for pattern detection, and proper CLI commands for operational tasks including savepoint-based upgrades.

checklist.name: ConfluentSettings usage
checklist.description: Java app creates TableEnvironment using ConfluentSettings.fromGlobalVariables()

checklist.name: ConfluentTools for results
checklist.description: Java app uses ConfluentTools.printMaterializedLimit() or collectMaterializedLimit() to display results

checklist.name: Statement Set syntax
checklist.description: Multi-output routing uses BEGIN STATEMENT SET; ... multiple INSERT INTO ...; END; syntax

checklist.name: MATCH_RECOGNIZE structure
checklist.description: Pattern detection uses MATCH_RECOGNIZE with PARTITION BY, ORDER BY, MEASURES, PATTERN, and DEFINE clauses

checklist.name: System column $rowtime
checklist.description: Uses $rowtime system column or declares watermark on the TIMESTAMP_LTZ column for Confluent managed tables

checklist.name: Compute pool create command
checklist.description: Operations script includes 'confluent flink compute-pool create' with --cloud, --region, and --max-cfu flags

checklist.name: Statement create command
checklist.description: Operations script includes 'confluent flink statement create' with --sql and --compute-pool flags

checklist.name: Savepoint workflow
checklist.description: Operations script shows savepoint-based upgrade: create savepoint, delete old statement, create new, resume from savepoint

checklist.name: Exception list command
checklist.description: Operations script includes 'confluent flink statement exception list' for debugging

checklist.name: Tumbling window for metrics
checklist.description: Shipment metrics uses Window TVF TUMBLE syntax with 1-hour interval for hourly aggregation

checklist.name: Confluent Cloud plugin dependency
checklist.description: Java app includes confluent-flink-table-api-java-plugin dependency or import

checklist.name: No unsupported features
checklist.description: Does NOT use DataStream API, batch mode, or CREATE DATABASE/CATALOG (not supported on Confluent Cloud)
